chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1198 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.4782/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 23.12.2025 Mr. Ghulam Muhammad associate of Mr. Sikander Ali Junejo, Advocate for the Petitioner Agha Ather Hussain Pathan, Assistant AG Sindh Mr. Imran Mobeen Khan, Assistant PG for the State >>>>>..<<<<< Learned Assistant PG places on record a copy of the statement of the Investigating Officer along with the case diary pertaining to FIR No. 52 of 2025, registered at Police Station Wasti Jiwan Shah, District Ghotki, for the offence punishable under section 452, 365-B, 34 PPC and 3 of TIP, 2018, which are taken on record. He submits that the said FIR, the quashment whereof has been sought through the instant constitutional petition, has already been challaned and is presently pending trial before the Court of the learned II-Additional Sessions Judge, Mirpur Mathelo, as Sessions Case No. 311 of 2025 (The State v. Sajid Ali alias Sajid Shar and others). In these circumstances, since the case/FIR, the quashment whereof has been sought from this Court, has already been challaned and is pending adjudication before a competent Court of law, no case for quashment is made out at this stage. Accordingly, the instant constitutional petition is dismissed. However, the petitioner is at liberty to approach the trial Court concerned for appropriate relief available to him under the law. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
